Index.title: Edge Subscription
Index.description: Convert your proxy endpoints & external subscriptions into Cloudflare configurations
Index.proxiesPlaceholder:
Paste your individual proxy uris here separated by newline...
For example:
tuic://uuid:password@host:port...

ActionBox.alertNoInput: Please provide at least a self-hosted proxy URI or an external subscription.

NodeModal.title: Quick Add Node
NodeModal.description: Paste a single proxy URI (vless, ss, trojan, etc.) and it will be added to the self-hosted list.
